import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(arr):
    # Calculate unique values in the array
    unique = np.unique(arr)

    # Set bin edges for alignment with unique values
    bins = np.arange(len(unique) + 1) - 0.5

    # Count frequency of each unique value in the array
    freq = np.bincount(arr, minlength=len(unique))

    # Check if distribution is uniform (same frequency for all unique values)
    uniform_distribution = np.all(freq == np.mean(freq))

    # Create a bar chart to visualize the distribution
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(bins, freq, width=1)

    # Set title and labels for the plot
    ax.set_title("Value Distribution")
    ax.set_xlabel("Unique Values")
    ax.set_ylabel("Frequency")

    return uniform_distribution, ax
